text: Assembly Election: Madhya Pradesh 2023. BJP: 163/230. INC: 66. Others: 1. Turnout: 75.6%. Mohan Yadav elected CM. Ladli Behna Yojana credited for BJP's landslide. Anti-incumbency did not work against BJP.
Assembly Election: Rajasthan 2023. BJP: 115/200. INC: 69. Others: 16. Turnout: 74.6%. Bhajan Lal Sharma elected CM. Traditional alternation pattern continued — BJP replaced INC after one term.

Assembly Election: Telangana 2023. INC: 64/119. BRS: 39. BJP: 8. Others: 8. Turnout: 71.3%. Revanth Reddy elected CM. INC returned to power after 10 years, ending KCR's BRS rule. Six guarantees campaign.

Assembly Election: Karnataka 2023. INC: 135/224. BJP: 66. JDS: 19. Others: 4. Turnout: 73.3%. Siddaramaiah elected CM. INC's five guarantees (Shakti, Gruha Jyothi, Gruha Lakshmi, Anna Bhagya, Yuva Nidhi) were decisive.

Assembly Election: Maharashtra 2024. Mahayuti: 235/288 (BJP 132, Shiv Sena-Shinde 57, NCP-Ajit Pawar 41, others 5). MVA: 49 (SS-UBT 20, NCP-SP 10, INC 16, others 3). Turnout: 66%. Devendra Fadnavis CM. Ladki Bahin Yojana impact.

Assembly Election: Jharkhand 2024. JMM-led INDIA: 56/81 (JMM 34, INC 16, RJD 4, CPI-ML 2). BJP-NDA: 24 (BJP 21, AJSU 1, JDU 1, LJP 1). Turnout: 67.7%. Hemant Soren re-elected CM. Tribal rights and welfare agenda won.

Assembly Election: Haryana 2024. BJP: 48/90. INC: 37. Others: 5. Turnout: 67.9%. Nayab Singh Saini elected CM. Surprise BJP 3rd-term victory defying anti-incumbency predictions. Non-Jat OBC consolidation was key factor.

Assembly Election: UP 2022. BJP: 255/403. SP: 111. BSP: 1. INC: 2. Others: 34. Turnout: 60.2%. Yogi Adityanath re-elected CM. First CM to return to power in UP in 37 years. Law and order, expressway development as issues.
